data.description: CHINA: TO DEVELOP FUTURE INDUSTRIES INCLUDING FUTURE ENERGY, QUANTUM TECHNOLOGY, EMBODIED INTELLIGENCE, BRAIN-COMPUTER INTERFACES AND 6G — GOVERNMENT WORK REPORT.
CHINA PLANS TO DIRECT FINANCIAL FIRMS TO PROVIDE MORE SUPPORT TO STIMULATE DOMESTIC DEMAND, TECHNOLOGY, INNOVATION, AND SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES, ACCORDING TO OFFICIAL SOURCES.

CHINA FIVE-YEAR PLAN: DIGITAL ECONOMY TARGETED TO REACH 12.5% OF GDP; GOVERNMENT TO BOOST SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY SPENDING TO 426.42 BLN YUAN IN 2026 — GOVERNMENT WORK REPORT. CHINA TO INCREASE BASIC RESEARCH FUNDING BY 16.3%, ACCELERATE MAJOR NATIONAL SCI-TECH PROJECTS AND PUSH
EUROSTOXX 50 FUTURES INCREASED BY 0.5%, AND DAX FUTURES WENT UP BY 0.3% IN THE TRADING SESSION.
CHINA SAYS IT WILL PROMOTE INTEGRATED DEVELOPMENT ACROSS THE TAIWAN STRAIT.
CHINA: ULTRA-LONG SPECIAL TREASURY BONDS TO FUND NATIONAL STRATEGIES, BOOST SECURITY CAPACITY, SUPPORT EQUIPMENT UPGRADES AND CONSUMER TRADE-IN PROGRAM — OFFICIAL REPORT.
CHINA: GOVERNMENT SPENDING TO REMAIN FAIRLY LARGE IN SCALE THIS YEAR — OFFICIAL REPORT.

CHINA SET A 2026 GROWTH TARGET OF 4.5% TO 5% — ITS LOWEST SINCE 1991 — AS PREMIER LI QIANG PREPARES TO OUTLINE A SHIFT AWAY FROM DEBT-DRIVEN PROPERTY AND INFRASTRUCTURE EXPANSION, WITH PRESIDENT XI JINPING BALANCING SLOWER GROWTH AGAINST LONG-TERM ECONOMIC RESTRUCTURING GOALS.

CHINA PLANS TO RAISE DEFENSE SPENDING BY 7% IN 2026 TO 1.91 TRILLION YUAN — THE SLOWEST INCREASE SINCE 2022 — AS PRESIDENT XI JINPING PUSHES MILITARY MODERNIZATION WHILE THE UNITED STATES UNDER DONALD TRUMP AND ALLIES LIKE JAPAN RAMP UP THEIR OWN DEFENSE BUDGETS.
CHINA'S LOCAL GOVERNMENTS WILL USE SPECIAL BONDS TO FINANCE BIG PROJECTS, DEAL WITH SECRET DEBT, AND PAY OFF OVERDUE PAYMENTS, ACCORDING TO THE OFFICIAL REPORT.
CHINA PLANS TO CREATE 100 BILLION YUAN SPECIAL FUNDS FOR FISCAL AND FINANCIAL COORDINATION TO IMPROVE DOMESTIC DEMAND, ACCORDING TO OFFICIAL SOURCES.
CHINA'S CENTRAL GOVERNMENT WILL GIVE LOCAL GOVERNMENTS 10.4 TRILLION YUAN IN TRANSFER PAYMENTS IN 2026, ACCORDING TO THE FINANCE MINISTRY'S REPORT.

data.title: Scott Stavig discusses the importance of box culverts for water flow management in Medford, Ore., on March 4, 2026.
data.description: In Medford, Oregon on March 4, 2026, an expert on precast concrete, Scott Stavig, discussed the importance of managing water effectively while ensuring reliable transportation routes. He highlighted that box culverts are renowned for their reliability in this aspect. The collaboration between engineers and municipalities in this regard is crucial for ensuring safety.
CHINA PLANS TO IMPROVE INNOVATION AND SOLVE IMPORTANT TECHNOLOGY PROBLEMS ACCORDING TO THE GOVERNMENT WORK REPORT.
CHINA DECLARES IT WILL STRONGLY OPPOSE AND FIGHT SEPARATIST GROUPS TRYING TO PUSH TOWARD 'TAIWAN INDEPENDENCE'.
CHINA WILL DIRECT MORE SOCIAL RESOURCES TO THE REAL ECONOMY, ACCORDING TO AN OFFICIAL REPORT.
CHINA STATES THAT THEY REMAIN DEDICATED TO THE ONE CHINA POLICY AND WILL NOT CHANGE THEIR POSITION.

CHINA TO RECAPITALIZE MAJOR STATE BANKS WITH 300 BLN YUAN FROM SPECIAL TREASURY BONDS IN 2026 — OFFICIAL REPORT. CHINA TO ISSUE 1.3 TRLN YUAN ULTRA-LONG SPECIAL TREASURY BONDS IN 2026 AND ALLOCATE 250 BLN YUAN TO SUPPORT CONSUMER GOODS TRADE-IN PROGRAM — OFFICIAL REPORT.
